title: Live Chat Widget Setup
content:
Add a live chat widget to your website so customers can chat with your team in real time.

**Installing the Widget:**
1. Settings → Channels → Live Chat → New Widget.
2. Customize: name, color, greeting message, operating hours.
3. Copy the JavaScript snippet provided.
4. Paste it before the `</body>` tag on your website.
5. Verify the widget appears on your site — it shows as a bubble in the bottom-right corner.

**Operating Hours:**
Set hours when agents are available. Outside hours, the widget shows an offline message and collects email for async follow-up.

**Chat Routing:**
Assign chats to a specific team or use round-robin to distribute evenly across online agents.

**Offline Fallback:**
When no agents are online, the widget converts to a contact form. Submissions create tickets automatically.

**Mobile Support:**
The widget is fully responsive and works on mobile browsers. Native mobile SDK available for iOS and Android (Enterprise plan).
